observations.reason: Function defined at line 423 is never invoked. The module docstring (line 72) explicitly states it is 'retained as dead code for reference' and 'is no longer consulted by main()'. This is an intentional decision documented in the revision history.
observations.recommendation: Do not remove in this pass. The function is an intentionally retained historical reference, explicitly documented as such. Removal should only occur in a separate safety-reviewed refactor of this actively-registered PreToolUse hook.
observations.notes: Pre-existing before this diff. Codex confirmed severity 'major' was misclassified and the deletion recommendation violated Safety Rules for actively-registered hooks. Demoted to observation-only per AC-12.1 Mechanism (ii) and codex review.

diff_scope_summary.change_description: 3 changes in this diff: (1) docstring corrected for _check_git_allowlist from 'non-commit/non-push' to 'non-push' reflecting new commit allowlist support, (2) informational hint added to _block_default_deny_commit BLOCKED stderr message about /allow bypass path, (3) _check_git_allowlist call added in _evaluate_commit to allow main-agent /allow grants to bypass commit block
diff_scope_summary.pycache_note: hooks/__pycache__/pretool-git-privilege-guard.cpython-312.pyc exists but is covered by .gitignore (both __pycache__/ and *.pyc patterns confirmed). Pre-existing runtime artifact, not introduced by this diff.

summary.verdict: CLEAN — no cleanliness violations introduced by this diff. One pre-existing intentional dead-code helper is noted as observation-only and is not a blocker.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex flagged 5 issues with the initial draft findings: (1) double-counting the same dead function under both obsolete_functionality and dead_functions, (2) pre-existing intentionally-retained dead code should not be a blocker in --changed-files mode, (3) severity 'major' misclassified for documented intentional dead code, (4) recommendation to remove function violates Safety Rules for actively-registered hooks modified in this cycle, (5) summary counts were inflated from the double-count.

findings.issue: Same pre-existing condition double-counted under both obsolete_functionality and dead_functions, inflating total_issues and major count
findings.proposed_fix: Remove the obsolete_functionality finding and keep at most one non-blocking dead_functions observation, or remove both
findings.rationale: Both categories merged into a single observation-only entry in observations[]; neither counts as a blocking finding

findings.issue: In --changed-files mode, _is_overnight_active() was not introduced by this diff and is explicitly documented as intentionally retained; counting it as major is out of scope
findings.proposed_fix: Change to OBSERVATION_ONLY: _is_overnight_active is pre-existing, intentionally documented dead code, and not introduced by this diff; no cleanup action required in this dev cycle
findings.rationale: Moved to observations[] with advisory: true, blocking: false, introduced_in_diff: false

findings.issue: Severity 'major' misclassified — no active malfunction, temp artifact, duplicate file, misplaced doc, or newly introduced dead code
findings.proposed_fix: Set severity to minor or info/observation, and exclude it from blocker totals
findings.rationale: Severity changed to 'info' in observation entry

findings.issue: Recommendation to 'Remove the dead function' is unsafe/out of scope for an actively registered safety hook modified in this cycle
findings.proposed_fix: Replace recommendation with: 'Do not delete in this pass. Leave the documented historical helper unchanged, or handle removal only in a separate safety-reviewed refactor with tests.'
findings.rationale: Recommendation text updated to match codex proposed fix

findings.issue: Summary incorrect if observations are not counted as findings
findings.proposed_fix: Set summary to total_issues: 0, critical: 0, major: 0, minor: 0
findings.rationale: Summary corrected to 0 for all finding counts; observation_only: 1 added as separate field

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 5 codex findings had PROPOSED_FIX and were applied: double-counting removed, pre-existing dead code demoted to observation-only, severity downgraded from major to info, deletion recommendation replaced with safety-aware guidance, summary corrected to 0 blocking issues
